campaigns.name: AI Outcomes, Not Tools
campaigns.objective: Position AI First Solutions as the outcome-focused partner for mid-market companies stuck on AI adoption, driving 20% increase in qualified demo requests within 90 days
campaigns.targetAudience: Mid-market companies (50–500 employees) frustrated by failed or stalled AI initiatives, CTOs and ops leaders who need practical implementation without IT complexity
campaigns.positioning: We don't install AI. We make it work.
keyMessages: We don't sell software. We deliver measurable business outcomes.
AI implementation doesn't require an enterprise IT team.
See how real companies saved 200+ hours/week with our framework.
contentThemes: Case studies showing before/after metrics from real mid-market implementations
ROI calculators and implementation checklists that demystify AI adoption
Behind-the-scenes how-tos on navigating AI complexity without technical overhead
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture via LinkedIn thought leadership and SEO-optimized blog posts
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture with ROI tools, implementation guides, and social proof
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff triggered by high-intent behaviors
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture
successMetrics: 50+ new leads/month from organic and social channels

salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: Lead card enriched with company name, industry, team size, specific AI use case, current tech stack pain points. Slack notification to #sales-qualified with priority level (high if score >= 80, standard if 65-79). AE contacted within 1 hour for high-intent, 4 hours for standard.
